'''鈭歬-ch-w-w''' ('''kakachwewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccine|vaccine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccine|vaccine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ch-w-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakachwewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachwewoko|thikachwewoko]] || [[word:jikachwewoko|jikachwewoko]] || [[word:shikachwewoko|shikachwewoko]] || [[word:kikachwewoko|kikachwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachwewoko|thuthukachwewoko]] || [[word:jujukachwewoko|jujukachwewoko]] || [[word:shushukachwewoko|shushukachwewoko]] || [[word:kukukachwewoko|kukukachwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachwewoko|thukachwewoko]] || [[word:jukachwewoko|jukachwewoko]] || [[word:shukachwewoko|shukachwewoko]] || [[word:kukachwewoko|kukachwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachwewoko|thukachwewoko]] || [[word:jukachwewoko|jukachwewoko]] || [[word:shukachwewoko|shukachwewoko]] || [[word:kukachwewoko|kukachwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachwewoko|thekachwewoko]] || [[word:jekachwewoko|jekachwewoko]] || [[word:shekachwewoko|shekachwewoko]] || [[word:kekachwewoko|kekachwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachwewoko|thothokachwewoko]] || [[word:jojokachwewoko|jojokachwewoko]] || [[word:shoshokachwewoko|shoshokachwewoko]] || [[word:kokokachwewoko|kokokachwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachwewoko|thokachwewoko]] || [[word:jokachwewoko|jokachwewoko]] || [[word:shokachwewoko|shokachwewoko]] || [[word:kokachwewoko|kokachwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachwewoko|thokachwewoko]] || [[word:jokachwewoko|jokachwewoko]] || [[word:shokachwewoko|shokachwewoko]] || [[word:kokachwewoko|kokachwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kachwewoko|th忙kachwewoko]] || [[word:j忙kachwewoko|j忙kachwewoko]] || [[word:sh忙kachwewoko|sh忙kachwewoko]] || [[word:k忙kachwewoko|k忙kachwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachwewoko|thathakachwewoko]] || [[word:jajakachwewoko|jajakachwewoko]] || [[word:shashakachwewoko|shashakachwewoko]] || [[word:kakakachwewoko|kakakachwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachwewoko|thakachwewoko]] || [[word:jakachwewoko|jakachwewoko]] || [[word:shakachwewoko|shakachwewoko]] || [[word:kakachwewoko|kakachwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachwewoko|thakachwewoko]] || [[word:jakachwewoko|jakachwewoko]] || [[word:shakachwewoko|shakachwewoko]] || [[word:kakachwewoko|kakachwewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
